scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec api sh -c 'cd /app/apps/api && node ../../node_modules/.bin/prisma migrate dev'
scripts.db:seed: docker compose exec api sh -c 'cd /app/apps/api && node ../../node_modules/.bin/tsx prisma/seed.ts'
scripts.db:studio: docker compose exec api sh -c 'cd /app/apps/api && node ../../node_modules/.bin/prisma studio'
